site.title: Sebastian Rösch
site.description: B.Sc. Business Informatics · Curious Builder. Portfolio of Sebastian Rösch.
hero.intro: I build systems that run reliably and models that make a difference.
about.title: About me
about.body: I hold a B.Sc. in business informatics with a focus on data-driven systems — at Fraunhofer ISE I built load-forecasting models for buildings. Before that, I automated SAP test processes with Tricentis TOSCA at Haufe Group — enterprise IT from the hands-on side. Lately I've been getting into the platform side through my own lab projects: Kubernetes, GitOps, ArgoCD. Between those, smaller experiments pile up, like a reinforcement-learning agent that learns to play Super Mario.
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my work — from platform engineering to machine learning.
